title: Offer — one complete object touching all four axes at once
description: A single realistic Offer (a hairdresser's appointment slot) exercising all six top-level keys together: Item (service), Availability (time-slots), Fulfilment (perform-at-place), Consideration (fixed), sell_to and published. This is the 'Offer with each of the four axes' vector the task asked for as one worked example, distinct from TRACT-WIRE-VEC-07..10 which enumerate every variant of each axis in isolation.

cases.name: haircut appointment offer
cases.note: 6-entry map, keys 1-6 all present and already ascending. `published` (1755000000000 ms since epoch) needs the 8-byte uint form (0x1B) since it exceeds 2**32-1.
